It marks a shift from previous social or travel-focused events, focusing instead on the satisfying experience of gardening and enjoying the fruits of labor on a sunny day.

events.description: On December 20, 2007, I enjoyed a delicious pizza dinner. The photo captures a close-up of two slices on a white plate, with one piece already being eaten. The pizza was generously topped with melted cheese, bright red tomatoes or peppers, red onions, and dark leafy greens, highlighting a cozy meal experience in a warm, dimly lit indoor setting.

events.name: A Foggy Night
events.description: On December 20, 2007, I documented a series of scenes during a remarkably foggy night. The conditions transformed familiar cityscapes into atmospheric and almost otherworldly views. I captured a prominent tree silhouetted against the diffused glow of streetlights and distant car headlights, with blurry red traffic lights adding to the moody atmosphere. Later, I photographed a street intersection where the dense fog made the traffic lights glow like intense orbs, revealing the limited visibility and the striking visual effects created by the mist.

events.name: Diamond Bear Brewing Co. at Night
events.description: On December 20, 2007, I photographed the Diamond Bear Brewing Co. building at night. I was drawn to its striking blue illuminated sign that stood out vibrantly against the dark surroundings, giving the industrial-looking facility a captivating nighttime presence.

events.name: Cozy Evening by the Fireplace
events.description: On December 21, 2007, I spent a relaxing evening at home, unwinding by a warm fireplace. I captured a cozy first-person view of my feet propped up, enjoying the comforting glow and warmth emanating from the crackling flames.

events.name: A Winter Walk
events.description: On December 23, 2007, I enjoyed a peaceful winter walk outdoors. During this outing, I took time to appreciate the subtle textures and patterns of nature, capturing close-ups of moss, soil, pebbles, and fallen oak leaves on the ground. I also had a heartwarming moment petting a furry dog that I encountered, capturing its soft fur as it lay comfortably in the dry grass, making the walk even more memorable.

events.name: Evening Flight
events.description: On December 24, 2007, I embarked on a journey, capturing breathtaking views from an airplane window. The flight offered stunning vistas of the sun setting or rising, painting the horizon in vibrant oranges and yellows against a deep blue sky. Below, the vast dark landscape unfolded, illuminated by a mosaic of reflective patches from winding rivers and distant clusters of city lights. The scenes depicted the serene beauty of the world from above during twilight, with glimpses of the airplane wing catching the horizon's glow.

events.name: Santa Monica Visit
events.description: On February 18, 2008, I enjoyed a wonderful visit to Santa Monica. The day included soaking in the tranquil atmosphere of a long, sandy beach, where calm ocean waters met the shore with gentle waves, and the coastline stretched towards rolling hills dotted with homes. During my exploration, I also captured the iconic 'SANTA MONICA' sign on a pedestrian bridge, surrounded by abundant palm trees and the distinctive, eroded cliffs, all under a clear and sunny sky, marking my experience in this beautiful and vibrant coastal city.

events.name: Relaxed Moment
events.description: On February 26, 2008, I captured a relaxed and peaceful moment while lying comfortably on a soft white pillow, likely at home. The scene conveys a sense of quiet relaxation, possibly right after waking up or unwinding for the day.

events.name: My Cat's Vet Visit
events.description: On March 2, 2008, we were preparing to take our cat to the vet. This image captures a kind woman carefully coaxing our brown tabby cat into a cardboard pet carrier, marked with 'Helping Your Veterinarian,' likely from a vet's office. The scene takes place indoors, highlighting the gentle effort involved in ensuring our pet's well-being.

events.name: Night Out with a Friend
events.description: On March 14, 2008, I enjoyed a social evening out with a friend. This image captures a lighthearted moment between us, with my friend smiling at the camera and me peeking from behind, in a dimly lit setting that hints at a relaxed gathering.

events.name: Quiet Moment at Home
events.description: On March 15, 2008, I captured a series of quiet, everyday moments of myself at home. This included a casual self-portrait taken indoors with natural light, reflecting a serene and personal instance, followed by a very close-up shot focusing on the intricate details of my beard, mouth, and nose. I also captured a profile shot, looking contemplatively to the side, with warm indoor lighting illuminating my full beard and the cozy details of my room. Later, I also indulged in a playful experiment, shaving off half of my beard, which I captured in both a direct self-portrait and a detailed close-up

events.name: Backyard Chill
events.description: On March 23, 2008, I enjoyed a relaxed moment in a casual outdoor setting. This photo captures me sitting on wooden steps in what appears to be a backyard or alleyway, with a barbecue grill visible in the background, suggesting a potential gathering or just a pleasant day spent outside. My appearance has also changed, as I'm now clean-shaven, marking a distinct shift from the previous week's beard experiments.

events.name: Bedroom Hangout
events.description: On March 24, 2008, I spent a relaxed evening at home, captured in this image where I'm seen holding a beer in my bedroom. The room, decorated with personal touches and featuring a prominent clothing rack, reflects a casual and lived-in environment. This moment encapsulates a laid-back, personal time, possibly unwinding after a day.

events.name: Cooking a Meal
events.description: On March 25, 2008, I documented the process of preparing a homemade meal in the kitchen. This image specifically captures a person serving a rich yellow curry, featuring various vegetables, over white rice into a bowl, highlighting the effort and care put into cooking a warm, comforting dish at home.

events.name: Textural Study
events.description: On March 25, 2008, I took a moment to appreciate the beauty in decay, capturing a detailed close-up of a heavily rusted metal surface. This photo focuses on the intricate textures and rich, warm tones of the oxidized material, transforming an ordinary object into an abstract photographic study.

events.name: Outdoor Architectural Study
events.description: On March 25, 2008, I embarked on an outdoor architectural study, capturing the interplay of light, shadow, and geometric forms in a multi-level structure. This photograph, taken from above, highlights the stark beauty of lines and angles against a natural backdrop, subtly including my own shadow as a mark of my presence and observation.

events.name: Riverside View
events.description: On March 25, 2008, I ventured out to capture a quiet moment by the river. From a vantage point on a concrete platform, I observed and photographed a person looking out over the water, framed by bare trees and a serene natural landscape. The scene, with its strong sunlight and shadows, conveyed a sense of peaceful contemplation.

events.name: Cherry Blossom Walk
events.description: On April 1, 2008, I enjoyed a delightful walk to admire the cherry blossoms, which were in spectacular full bloom. I captured various scenes, including expansive vistas of trees lining a serene body of water, close-ups of delicate weeping cherry branches, and the striking silhouettes of blossoming trees against the sky, with the sun sometimes peeking through the clouds. I also observed moments like an older gentleman strolling along the promenade and a grand brick building framed by the blooms. Towards the end of the walk, I encountered a section where the pathway next to the water was partial

events.name: My Friend and Her Cat
events.description: On April 14, 2008, I spent some time with a friend and captured a sweet moment of her holding her beautiful, fluffy tabby cat. The cat had striking bright yellow-green eyes, and my friend was smiling gently as I took the photo in a casual indoor setting.

events.name: Beach Day
events.description: On April 20, 2008, I enjoyed a sunny day at the beach, capturing the iconic view of a light blue lifeguard tower, marked with the number 10, on the sandy shore. The scene included a long ramp leading up to the tower, some graffiti on its exterior, and in the distance, other beachgoers and buildings under a clear blue sky, making for a perfect day by the ocean.

events.name: Meeting Chuck Davis
events.description: On April 20, 2008, I documented a visit or meeting by capturing a sign for 'Chuck Davis', accompanied by the number '1'. This image, taken indoors, marks a distinct new encounter or a visit to a specific location, separate from my earlier activities.

events.name: Hotel Stay
events.description: On April 21, 2008, I documented a new episode of a hotel stay. This image captures a man in a suit getting ready, checking his appearance in a mirror, with an ironing board in the foreground. It marks a moment of preparation during travel, distinct from previous activities.

events.name: Backyard Fire & Roasting
events.description: On May 1, 2008, I hosted a delightful and casual outdoor cooking session and gathering in my backyard. The evening began with tending to a lively charcoal grill, where we enjoyed roasting, and meticulously preparing food like seasoned artichokes. As the night progressed, the ambiance shifted to a relaxed outdoor hangout, with drinks, snacks, and the soft glow of string lights illuminating friends enjoying the cozy atmosphere, capturing candid moments of our shared evening.

events.name: Evening Out with Friends
events.description: On May 2, 2008, I enjoyed a pleasant evening out with friends. We were likely at an outdoor cafe or restaurant patio, enjoying the relaxed atmosphere as dusk turned to night. The surroundings were dimly lit by streetlights, with details like parked bicycles and a metal fence visible in the background, creating a cozy urban setting for our gathering.

events.name: Late-Night Bike Moment with a Friend
events.description: On May 15, 2008, I captured a specific, candid moment with a friend at night. He was on some residential steps, holding his bicycle, and we were likely just hanging out or preparing for a ride in the quiet urban setting.

events.name: Fun Night In with Friends
events.description: On May 19, 2008, I captured a joyful and humorous evening with friends, marked by laughter and playful antics. We enjoyed dressing up with various props like straw hats, fake mustaches, and oversized aviator sunglasses. I photographed friends striking comical poses, from happy smiles and playful closed eyes to dramatic expressions. One friend wore a 'the wrens' t-shirt, while another held a cigarette delicately in character. I also captured a funny moment of a friend wearing a straw boater hat, playfully holding a fake mustache to her lip with her eyes closed, and another friend in a straw hat

events.name: Relaxing in the Backyard
events.description: On May 19, 2008, I enjoyed a peaceful time outdoors, capturing candid moments with friends in a natural setting. The vibrant green foliage served as a beautiful backdrop, highlighting a relaxed atmosphere. I photographed a friend smiling gently in natural light, showcasing the serene and casual vibe of our outdoor gathering.

events.name: Patio Hangout
events.description: On May 26, 2008, and continuing a few days later, I enjoyed relaxing outdoor gatherings on a patio. I captured moments of friends, including one sitting comfortably amidst string lights and a potted plant, and another friend smiling warmly in his baseball cap and denim jacket against a brick and wooden backdrop, creating a casual and cozy atmosphere for our hangouts.

events.name: Everyday Views and Home Life
events.description: On June 2, 2008, I began capturing glimpses of my daily life and home environment. The first photo showed a vibrant red rug drying on a railing, set against an urban backdrop of buildings and trees under a clear sky. The next day, on June 3, I documented a more interior scene, playfully gesturing at the camera while a large white appliance, possibly a water heater, was being maneuvered in a doorway. This photo also revealed a packed bookshelf and a wooden oar, further illustrating the lived-in details of my home.

events.name: Fabulous Evening Out
events.description: On June 6, 2008, I enjoyed a memorable 'Fabulous Evening Out' with friends. The night was filled with lively social interactions, including posing with a dazzling drag queen magnificently dressed in a black lace gown and crown. We also dove into some competitive fun, with my friends intently focused on an arcade game, wielding toy guns. This festive evening, combining glamour and gaming, was a special departure from our usual routines.

events.name: Home Life Moments
events.description: On June 9, 2008, I documented various intimate moments related to my home life and immediate surroundings. This included a relaxed self-portrait, tranquil nighttime views from my vantage point, showcasing city lights and natural silhouettes like trees and power lines, and a candid shot of a man smoking a cigarette in a dimly lit setting. These photos collectively depict a serene and contemplative atmosphere of quiet evenings and personal space.

events.name: Outdoor Swim
events.description: On June 16, 2008, I documented an outdoor swimming activity, capturing a person enjoying a refreshing dip in what appears to be a large body of water, possibly a lake or river.

events.name: Waterside Nature Outing
events.description: On June 16, 2008, I documented our 'Waterside Nature Outing,' capturing various moments by a wide, rocky river. I photographed a man wading and partially submerged in the water, shirtless with a distinctive side tattoo. I also captured this man drying himself off with a towel by the river, with a hat and another towel nearby, likely after a swim. I also captured several moments of a woman: first on a large rock by the river, dressed in a black bikini top and dark shorts, adjusting a white piece of clothing; later, she was hiking through lush wooded paths with a backpack and sticks, and crouchi

events.name: Autumn Wetlands Exploration
events.description: On November 21, 2008, I ventured into a unique natural setting for an 'Autumn Wetlands Exploration'. I captured a beautiful scene within a swampy, wooded area, characterized by tall trees, some with exposed roots, standing in shallow water. The water perfectly mirrored the sky and surrounding trees, creating a serene and reflective atmosphere. I even managed to capture my own shadow, holding my camera, as a subtle self-portrait amidst the natural beauty. The ground was dotted with fallen leaves and debris, adding to the autumnal feel of the landscape.

events.name: Evening Out at a Lively Bar
events.description: On February 12, 2009, I enjoyed an 'Evening Out at a Lively Bar'. I captured the vibrant and inviting atmosphere of an outdoor or semi-outdoor bar at night. The scene featured a well-stocked wooden bar with two bartenders serving a customer. The entire area was beautifully adorned with numerous string lights, creating a warm and festive glow, particularly around a prominent leafy tree, making for a memorable night out.

events.name: Relaxed Morning Moment
events.description: On February 13, 2009, I captured a serene and joyful 'Relaxed Morning Moment.' The photo features a man lying comfortably in bed, smiling contentedly with his eyes closed. His shirtless, salt-and-pepper bearded appearance, along with the soft lighting, conveys a peaceful and happy start to the day or a moment of pure relaxation.

events.name: Documenting My Garden's Growth
events.description: On February 13, 2009, I dedicated time to documenting the vibrant growth and progress of various plants in my garden. This collection of photos captures the journey of my produce, including a healthy pea plant with developing pods gracefully climbing its trellis, a young citrus plant (perhaps a lime or kumquat) thriving with small green fruits and water-kissed leaves, and a striking red chili pepper plant, showcasing its ripe fruit amidst green foliage and delicate white flowers against a clear sky. Each image highlights the success and beauty of my gardening efforts.

events.name: Urban Street Exploration
events.description: On February 14, 2009, I embarked on some urban exploration, documenting interesting street scenes and adding my own whimsical touches. I captured moments of my hand carefully placing small paper cut-out figures onto various urban fixtures. This included a signpost at a bus stop, featuring a 'big blue bus' sign and a 'rapid 7' schedule, adorned with various stickers, and later, a pedestrian crosswalk signal with its 'START CROSSING' and 'DO NOT CROSS' instructions. The consistent setting of a sunny urban environment with palm trees in the background connects these observations and playful inter

events.name: Beach Day Outing
events.description: On February 14, 2009, I enjoyed a sunny Santa Monica outing, focusing on my ongoing art project. I captured whimsical photos of my paper cut-out figures against diverse backdrops, including the iconic Santa Monica Pier with its Ferris wheel, the sandy beach, coastal buildings, the 'SANTA MONICA' sign, beneath the pier amidst its sturdy wooden pillars, and striking urban architecture like the large white buildings perched atop the coastal cliffs overlooking the road. My explorations also led me to unique public installations like a dinosaur-shaped bush fountain, a historical marker, and vibrant

events.name: Hollywood Exploration
events.description: On February 15, 2009, I ventured to Hollywood and began exploring its famous landmarks. I captured a photograph of Robert Goulet's star on the iconic Hollywood Walk of Fame, admiring the unique tributes embedded in the sidewalk.

events.name: Evening Sunset Views
events.description: On February 18, 2009, I captured a series of beautiful evening and sunset views. This collection includes various perspectives: from a serene gradient of warm yellows and oranges with silhouetted palm trees and subtle power lines, to a fiery spectacle of deep reds and oranges as the sun dipped below the horizon, powerfully silhouetting trees and buildings. Another image shows an expansive blue sky transitioning into lighter hues over a distant cityscape, with the sun's golden glow reflecting off buildings. The collection also features a dramatic scene where the sun, a brilliant orange orb, set

events.name: Camping Trip
events.description: On March 1, 2009, I documented a memorable camping trip, immersing myself in the diverse natural beauty of the area. We explored tranquil spots, including gushing streams, narrow canyons with calm waters flanked by massive rocky formations, and a serene river winding through a valley lined with lush trees and rugged mountains. I captured panoramic views of verdant slopes meeting calm waters, towering rocky cliff faces rising dramatically, and porous boulders partially submerged in the water. I also snapped a moment of a companion quietly contemplating the peaceful waters. It was an invigoratin

events.name: City Views
events.description: On March 5, 2009, I continued exploring an urban environment, capturing various city views that highlighted the interplay between large architectural structures and the surrounding cityscape. I took multiple shots showing the impressive metal framework of an elevated bridge, with different perspectives of the streets below. These images reveal multi-story buildings, active streets with parked cars, and identifiable street signs like 'Beale' street, all under a clear sky. It was a day dedicated to observing the unique character and detailed scenes within the urban landscape from different angle

events.name: Casual Portraits
events.description: On March 8, 2009, I took some casual portraits, capturing two men posing against a simple, light-colored background. The strong natural light highlighted their sunglasses and created a relaxed, informal atmosphere. It was a simple, spontaneous moment I wanted to remember.

events.name: Beach Sunset
events.description: On March 8, 2009, I spent a beautiful evening at the beach, capturing the stunning transition from sunset to dusk. The golden hour painted the sky with warm hues as the sun dipped below the horizon, silhouetting tall palm trees and the distant figures of people enjoying the tranquil scene. I photographed various perspectives, including a wide shot of the sandy expanse featuring a classic light blue lifeguard tower and a volleyball net, with a line of palm trees and coastal buildings stretching along the shore. It was a truly peaceful and memorable visit to the ocean, highlighting the natural b

events.name: Sunny Day Outdoors
events.description: On March 14, 2009, I enjoyed a beautiful sunny day outdoors, capturing various moments of natural beauty and relaxation. The day included a serene appreciation of a solitary palm tree reaching into a clear blue sky, admiring its unique shape and the expansive backdrop. Later, I found a tranquil spot in a verdant field dotted with countless white flowers, where I reclined and captured a peaceful first-person view of my legs in white sneakers, fully embracing the calm and bright surroundings.

events.name: Drawn Heart on Hand
events.description: On March 15, 2009, I took a moment to capture a personal and playful detail: a drawn heart with a banner bearing the initials "T.O." on the back of my hand. The bright sunlight illuminated the drawing, creating a casual and intimate memory.

events.name: Diner Fun
events.description: On March 15, 2009, I captured a series of heartwarming and joyful moments during a fun outing at a diner. The photographs beautifully illustrate the affectionate bond and lively interactions between a man and a young girl, both dressed in charming matching red and white shirts. They are seen sharing laughter, gentle embraces, playful grabs, holding hands, and even enthusiastically raising their arms in celebration, all while enjoying their time in a diner booth. The bright and pleasant atmosphere, with lush greenery and distant buildings visible through the window, created a truly memorable ex

events.name: Road Trip
events.description: My road trip spanned from April 7 to April 8, 2009, documenting both the journey and our stops. The initial photos captured moments inside the car, including a man looking out through a sunroof and hands on a steering wheel, conveying the experience of being on the move. We also explored local areas, taking multiple wider shots from elevated positions that showcased a distinctive red-orange building, various ventilation pipes on roofs, small parking lots, and distant green hills under a bright sky, all crisscrossed by power lines. The evening of April 8th brought more serene observations, firs

events.name: Pet Moments
events.description: On April 8, 2009, I captured a heartwarming moment with a fluffy black dog, focusing on its sweet and attentive expression indoors. This marks a shift from the previous road trip, indicating a period of relaxed interaction.

events.name: Office Workspace
events.description: On April 10, 2009, I captured scenes from my office environment, showcasing my workspace with a laptop and other workstations. A striking feature was a large print of a young alligator on the wall, set against the backdrop of a modern office with exposed ceiling architecture.

events.name: Evening by the Sea
events.description: On April 11, 2009, I spent a lovely evening out with a friend, enjoying a meal or drinks at a restaurant or bar situated by the sea. From our indoor vantage point, I captured both a close-up of my friend and the broader ambiance looking out through the large windows. The twilight sky cast a serene, deep blue hue over the water and distant coastline, creating a beautiful and reflective backdrop for our relaxed gathering. The setting was quite scenic, with the outdoor lights and structures visible along the coast under the deep blue night sky.

events.name: Visit to a PETA Center
events.description: On April 14, 2009, I visited a location likely associated with the People for the Ethical Treatment of Animals (PETA). During my visit, I documented two distinct signs. One sign, humorously titled 'ANIMAL HOUSE RULES' and adorned with a pig silhouette, laid out strict guidelines for maintaining cleanliness and order within a shared space, suggesting operational rules for a facility. The other sign was a dedication to 'The Margaret Parkinson & Karen Creason Garden,' featuring a portrait of the two women and the PETA logo, indicating a named space or garden honoring their contributions within th

events.name: City Views from Above
events.description: On April 15, 2009, I captured a series of expansive urban views from a high vantage point under an overcast sky. One perspective detailed a bustling construction site with a bulldozer, shipping container, and building materials, along with a newly built bridge, highway, and residential buildings lining a river, indicative of the city's ongoing development. Another view offered a different segment of the city, featuring a serene body of water, a bridge, and distinctive buildings characterized by their red-domed roofs, surrounded by mature green trees. These photos collectively document the dive

events.name: Driving on a Hot Day
events.description: On April 20, 2009, I documented a moment from inside my car, capturing the dashboard display that prominently showed a temperature of 102°F. The image, though reflective with sunlight and trees visible, clearly conveys the intense heat of the day while I was driving.

events.name: A Walk in the Snow
events.description: On April 25, 2009, I captured an unexpected and memorable moment stepping into a fresh snowfall. The image shows my feet, clad in jeans, sinking into the sparkling white powder, marking a distinct change in weather from previous days.

events.name: Evening Neon Signs
events.description: On April 25, 2009, I photographed a lively display of neon signs during what appears to be an evening outing. The scene features a prominent 'SWEET' sign alongside a smaller, playful ice cream cone graphic, suggesting a visit to a dessert shop or a vibrant urban area at night. This marked a distinct change of scenery and activity from earlier in the day.

events.name: Outdoor Exploration Day
events.description: On April 25, 2009, I spent time immersing myself in nature, capturing diverse aspects of the landscape. This included a serene daytime view of a rocky hillside, partially covered in snow, with tall evergreen trees reaching towards the sky, showcasing the lingering winter beauty. My exploration also led me to a clear body of water, where I captured the mesmerizing dance of sunlight on the surface, creating intricate patterns over the visible stones and pebbles on the bottom. These moments highlight the tranquility and varied details of the natural environment.

events.name: Spring Snow Play
events.description: On April 26, 2009, I documented a fun and playful day spent amidst unexpected spring snow. The scene captures a man, distinct in his green hoodie and shorts, standing barefoot on a snowy patch, preparing to toss a snowball. A rustic wooden building, likely a lodge or cabin, along with evergreen trees, frames the background, suggesting a serene mountain or rural setting. The presence of another individual partially visible on the snow further indicates a lively group activity, making the most of the lingering winter elements in late April.

events.name: Coastal Views and Crashing Waves
events.description: On November 27, 2009, I explored a dramatic coastline, capturing its raw beauty and serene atmosphere. The outing included moments of observing powerful waves relentlessly crashing against rugged rocks and walking along scenic paths. I photographed the expansive ocean stretching to a hazy horizon under an overcast sky, with misty hills framing the distant coast. One particular memory I captured was seeing a man peacefully walking his dog, a beagle, along a grassy cliffside path overlooking the vast sea, surrounded by lush green landscapes.

events.name: Evening of Festive Lights
events.description: On November 27, 2009, my evening took a delightful turn as I encountered a beautifully decorated tree, completely adorned with warm yellow string lights. The tree created a magical glow against the dark night sky, with a subtle crescent moon peeking through. This charming scene, complete with smaller illuminated plants and glimpses of activity in the background, brought a festive and warm atmosphere to the evening.

events.name: Autumn Forest Walk
events.description: On November 29, 2009, I enjoyed a peaceful autumn walk through a serene forest. The winding path was covered with fallen leaves, and the gnarled, moss-covered trees created a tranquil atmosphere. I captured the quiet beauty of the woods, observing a small white dog exploring ahead on the trail amidst the natural greenery and subtle hints of yellow from the changing leaves.

events.name: Red Rock Desert Exploration
events.description: On January 25, 2010, I embarked on an exploration of a stunning desert landscape. I captured a panoramic view of magnificent red rock formations towering under a clear blue sky, surrounded by diverse desert vegetation, including green juniper trees and silvery scrub brush. The wide shot highlights the grandeur and vastness of this natural wilderness.

events.name: Fresh Wildflower Bouquet
events.description: On March 14, 2010, I brought a touch of natural beauty into my home by arranging a fresh bouquet of wildflowers. The vibrant mix of yellow, orange, purple, and white blooms, along with lush green foliage, was placed in a clear vase on my dark coffee table, against the backdrop of my comfortable brown sofa. It was a simple yet effective way to add cheer and freshness to my living space.

events.name: Fresh Garden Harvest
events.description: On September 29, 2010, I celebrated the fruits of my labor with a fresh garden harvest. The collection included vibrant red radishes or small beets and a substantial pale parsnip or white carrot, all complete with their green tops. Laid out on a clean counter, with a knife and chopped herbs nearby, these vegetables were ready for preparation, highlighting the simple joy of cooking with freshly gathered produce.

events.name: Winter Forest Outing
events.description: On December 30, 2010, I embarked on a memorable winter forest outing with a friend. We were bundled warmly against the cold, exploring a serene, snow-covered woodland. Our journey included documenting the pristine snow-covered ground, breathtaking views of majestic, snow-capped mountain peaks, and striking icy cliff faces framed by snow-dusted evergreen and ice-encrusted bare trees. We traversed snowy paths that offered dramatic vistas of towering, snow-covered mountains against a clear blue sky, emphasizing the grandeur of the landscape and the solitude of our trek. My friend was seen joyfull

events.name: Hot Springs Visit
events.description: On January 17, 2011, my friend and I enjoyed a relaxing and exploratory visit to natural hot springs. The area was often enveloped in a thick, warm mist, creating a serene atmosphere around the vibrant green waters, lush foliage, and moss-covered rocks. We took in the picturesque views, including a small waterfall and distinctive architecture like the grand 'OZARK' building with its bell tower and red-tiled roof, which even had subtle holiday wreaths on its windows. During our exploration, we also encountered and photographed the intriguing entrance to 'Tunnel Spring,' marked by a sign and sec

events.name: Road Trip
events.description: On May 8, 2011, I embarked on a memorable road trip, capturing both the journey and the scenic views. I took a photo of my friend driving what looked like a vintage VW van, appreciating the relaxed atmosphere of its warm interior, a blend of retro and modern elements, on a bright and sunny day. As we drove, I also made sure to capture the expansive, diverse landscapes passing by from the car window, featuring rolling hills under a wide blue sky with fluffy white clouds. The scenery transitioned from dry, golden grasses to greener patches, with small communities nestled into the hillsides, trul

events.name: Beach Day
events.description: On May 8, 2011, we had a fantastic 'Beach Day' filled with various activities and beautiful coastal scenery. I captured my friend in relaxed portraits on the sandy shore and candidly laughing against the sandy cliffs. Our energetic dog had a blast, not only leaping and rolling in the warm sand but also enjoying the car ride with its head out the window of our vintage-style van, soaking in the sights and smells. We also witnessed the dynamic spectacle of a kitesurfer expertly riding the waves with a vibrant orange kite. Beyond the immediate shore, we explored the natural landscape, climbing a l

events.name: Morning Views from Home
events.description: On May 9, 2011, I captured a serene morning view from what appears to be my balcony. The image features a distant urban landscape bathed in the soft, hazy glow of the rising or setting sun, with hills in the background. Potted plants and hanging baskets on the balcony add a personal touch to the tranquil scene.

events.name: Goodyear Blimp Sighting
events.description: On May 10, 2011, I captured a clear blue sky featuring the iconic Goodyear blimp. The image also includes the fronds of a palm tree in the foreground and a couple of utility lines, documenting a bright and serene daytime observation.

events.name: Still Life: Plants and Shoes
events.description: On May 17, 2011, I captured this unique still life from my home, showcasing a cluster of tall green plants with delicate, spherical blooms and developing buds in the foreground. They stand prominently against a warm, textured yellow wall. Adding to the domestic charm, two pairs of canvas shoes, one white and one grey, are visible hanging on the wall in the upper left, creating an interesting composition of nature and everyday objects.

events.name: Nighttime Glow
events.description: On May 18, 2011, I captured this striking evening scene, featuring a building bathed in the warm, inviting glow of its interior and exterior lights. Against a deep dark blue night sky, the illuminated windows and a brightly lit doorway with stairs create a captivating contrast, making the structure stand out as a cozy beacon. A subtle fence line in the foreground adds depth to this peaceful urban nightscape, emphasizing the contrast between the dark surroundings and the golden light.

events.name: Night Photography: Light Trails
events.description: On May 19, 2011, I dedicated time to night photography, capturing the mesmerizing effects of long exposures. This session included two distinct but related scenes: one featuring a diagonal trail of dotted red and white lights from an airplane traversing the vast night sky, with subtle blue specks of stars visible; and another showcasing a vibrant red light trail from a passing vehicle cutting across a residential street scene. Both images capture the transient beauty of light trails against the dark canvas of night, from the expansiveness of the sky to the quiet movements within a neighborhood

events.name: Balcony DIY Project
events.description: On May 24, 2011, I captured a friend engaged in a DIY woodworking project on a balcony. The image shows him carefully cutting wood with a miter box, surrounded by tools and materials, under the warm, soft light of late afternoon. It's a snapshot of a focused and creative outdoor work session.

We had a fire going in the metal fire pit, with two pans warming over the glowing embers – one covered pot and an open frying pan, suggesting we were preparing a warm meal to fend off the cold. What struck me was how resourceful we were; we even had a couple pairs of our athletic shoes propped up near the heat, likely drying out after trekking through the snow, along with a patterned cloth. It really captured the practical side of our snowy adventure, keeping warm and fed in the crisp winter air.

photos.caption: Yosemite, NYE 2010
photos.captionKii: On December 30, 2010, during my winter forest outing, I captured this serene view of the snow-covered ground. The fresh, untouched snow was beautifully illuminated by patches of sunlight, creating a bright contrast against the long, dramatic shadows cast by the surrounding trees. The ground was a pristine carpet of white, textured by subtle undulations, and it perfectly conveyed the quiet, crisp atmosphere of that peaceful winter day.

photos.caption: Yosemite, NYE 2010 — We got to Yosemite just in time for a blizzard.
photos.captionKii: On December 30, 2010, my friend and I captured this close-up selfie while we were bundled up in a beautiful, snow-covered forest. We're both looking straight at the camera, with the falling snow and dense trees creating a serene, wintry backdrop. I'm wearing a dark hat, glasses, and a heavy coat with a scarf, trying to stay warm, while my friend next to me has on a blue hooded jacket with a cap underneath. The soft, diffuse light really highlights the peaceful and slightly magical atmosphere of being surrounded by so much fresh snow. It was a refreshing winter escape, and I love how this photo

photos.caption: Yosemite, NYE 2010 — Frozen dog leash--15°!
photos.captionKii: On December 30, 2010, still enjoying our winter forest outing, I captured my friend looking so pleased as he proudly displayed a long, curved icicle he found. He's bundled up in a blue hooded jacket, dark pants, and gloves, standing in the middle of the pristine snow-covered ground. The background is filled with snow-laden evergreen trees, and you can even spot our car partly covered in snow. His bright smile really captures the simple joy of being out in nature during winter, despite the cold. It was a fun and memorable moment during our exploration.

photos.caption: Yosemite, NYE 2010 — We got to Yosemite just in time for a blizzard.
photos.captionKii: On December 30, 2010, during my winter forest outing, I took a moment to capture this breathtaking view looking up at a majestic, snow-capped mountain peak. The imposing summit stands proudly against a clear, deep blue sky, framed perfectly by the dark silhouettes of snow-dusted evergreen trees. The scene truly conveyed the grandeur and serene beauty of the winter landscape we were exploring. It was such a peaceful and awe-inspiring sight, making me feel small yet connected to the vastness of nature.

photos.caption: Roof beets — Harvested the beets, and one was mysteriously all-white. Delicious!
photos.captionKii: On September 29, 2010, I captured this fresh bounty of root vegetables, likely just harvested, laid out on a clean surface. There's a vibrant mix of small, round red radishes or beets with their green leafy tops still attached, along with one larger, pale parsnip or white carrot, showing its intricate root system. A sharp knife and some chopped green herbs are visible nearby, suggesting I was getting ready to clean or prepare them for a meal. It's always so satisfying to work with produce this fresh, straight from the garden.

photos.caption: Wildflowers — As the rainy few weeks come to a close, wildflowers are erupting everywhere.  These are from last weekend's hike through Mandeville Canyon.
photos.captionKii: On March 14, 2010, I brightened up my living space with this lovely, vibrant bouquet of fresh flowers, likely gathered from a garden or even a roadside. The arrangement featured a wonderful mix of yellow, orange, and purple blooms, along with some delicate white blossoms and plenty of fresh green foliage. They were placed simply in a clear glass vase on my dark coffee table, with my comfy brown sofa and a patterned pillow visible in the background. It was a simple way to bring a bit of nature's beauty and cheer indoors.

It was a serene moment, capturing the quiet interaction between the man and his dog amidst the raw beauty of the coastline on a misty day.

photos.caption: Find the hikers — Let me zoom in a little.
photos.captionKii: On March 1, 2009, I captured this beautiful panoramic view of a lush green hillside sloping down towards calm, dark water. The slope is densely covered with vibrant trees and shrubs, showcasing the rich vegetation of the area. On the right, a prominent rocky cliff face rises, adding to the rugged beauty of the landscape. The bright blue sky overhead, with a faint white streak, suggests a clear and pleasant day. I framed the shot with some leaves in the foreground, which added a nice natural border to this serene scene we were enjoying during our camping trip.

photos.caption: Big rocks — These boulders easily rise 30 feet off the surface of the water.  This picture is taken from about 75 feet up on the edge off the trail/cliff.
photos.captionKii: On March 1, 2009, I captured this striking view of large, light-colored boulders partially submerged in calm, dark water. The rocks have a distinctive porous texture, almost like sponges, and some are tinged with a subtle green or blue hue, possibly from algae or mineral deposits. They create a rugged natural barrier along what appears to be a quiet section of a river or a deep pool. In the background, rocky cliffs rise, and a bare branch from a tree reaches over the water, adding to the serene and untouched natural beauty of the area we were exploring during our camping trip.

photos.caption: Big California oak tree
photos.captionKii: On March 1, 2009, I captured a peaceful moment at our campsite, with our white and blue tent nestled comfortably beneath the sprawling, ancient branches of a massive tree. The sun was high, casting beautiful dappled light through the dense foliage, creating a perfect shaded spot. In the background, I could see a picnic table and the wide, grassy field of the campground, hinting at the expansive and serene natural environment we were enjoying during our camping trip.

photos.caption: Campsite view
photos.captionKii: On March 1, 2009, I captured this broad view of our campsite, nestled under the shade of large trees. Beyond our immediate spot, a wide, sun-drenched grassy field stretches out, dotted with other tents and vehicles in the distance, showing the lively atmosphere of the campground. photos.caption: Tent view
photos.captionKii: On March 1, 2009, I captured this peaceful moment looking up from inside my tent. The mesh ceiling of the tent frames a magnificent view of a large, old tree with sprawling branches and vibrant green leaves, beautifully backlit by the morning sun. The bright blue sky peeks through the foliage, creating a serene and invigorating scene. It felt like such a perfect way to wake up, surrounded by nature and the quiet rustling of leaves.

photos.caption: The sun setting on the ocean, between the knobs of an office building nearer the beach.  I love the view from our roof.
photos.captionKii: On February 18, 2009, I captured another incredible sunset, this one a fiery spectacle of deep reds and oranges. The sun was a vivid, glowing half-circle just dipping below the horizon, casting the entire sky in brilliant hues. Below, the landscape was almost completely silhouetted against the powerful light, with dark outlines of trees and a building on the right forming a striking contrast. It was a truly breathtaking moment, feeling the dramatic end of the day.

photos.caption: Kiss — Just touching the ocean.
photos.captionKii: On February 18, 2009, I captured another dramatic sunset scene. The sun, a brilliant orange orb, was just beginning to dip below the horizon on the left, casting a rich, fiery glow across the lower sky that transitioned from deep orange and red to a darker blue-green higher up. The silhouettes of buildings along the city skyline stood stark against the vibrant colors. Two prominent horizontal lines, likely power lines, cut across the upper frame, adding a layer of urban structure to the breathtaking natural spectacle of the fading day.

photos.caption: Newborn blimp tangled in palm fronds. — or is it nursing?
photos.captionKii: On February 18, 2009, I captured this serene sunset, a beautiful end to the day. The sky is awash in a gradient of warm yellows and oranges, deepening into a rich amber closer to the horizon. Silhouetted against this vibrant backdrop are several tall palm trees, their fronds creating intricate dark patterns. A few power lines stretch horizontally across the frame, adding a subtle touch of human presence to the otherwise natural landscape. It was a peaceful moment, reflecting on the beauty of the evening.

photos.caption: Fleet — The birds flying back inland at sunset.
photos.captionKii: On February 18, 2009, I captured this peaceful moment at dusk. The sky was a beautiful gradient, transitioning from a deep blue-green at the top to a warm, soft orange-yellow near the horizon. Silhouetted prominently against this colorful backdrop was a lone palm tree, its fronds a dark, intricate shape. What made the scene even more dynamic were the numerous birds scattered across the sky, their dark forms contrasting with the fading light as they flew. A couple of power lines also stretched horizontally, adding another layer to the serene evening landscape.

photos.caption: Looking into Los Angeles from Santa Monica — Those are the buildings of Century City, an expensive stretch of development along Santa Monica Boulevard.  The Getty is also pretty visible up in the mountains.

It was another peaceful moment, taking in the wide, open sky and the city's quiet evening transformation.

photos.caption: Robert Gouleeeeeeet! — I was in Hollywood getting coffee beans and this star just begged to be admired.
photos.captionKii: On February 15, 2009, I took this photo of Robert Goulet's star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame. There's a small piece of white paper resting on the sidewalk just above it. It was cool to walk along and see all the different names embedded in the street, truly feeling the history of Hollywood and its entertainment legacy.

photos.caption: Satsumas — Just babies, loving the rain.

It's wonderful to see the progress of my plants and the promise of a harvest.

The pepper looks healthy and ripe, a proud moment of seeing my garden thrive and produce.

photos.caption: Peas!

The pods look plump and ready, a satisfying sight of nature's progress, perhaps from my own garden or balcony. I captured this moment to document the journey of these plants.

photos.caption: Noserub.  Allergies.  I miss the Deep South.

He's shirtless, wearing jeans, and has a distinctive dark tattoo on his left side. His left hand is raised to his nose and mouth, as if he's blowing out water or adjusting to the temperature after being submerged. The water around him is a bit blurry, suggesting movement, but it really conveys the feeling of being right there in the cool river.

In this close-up, he's partially submerged in the dark, slightly choppy water, looking to his left as he glides forward. I can clearly see the distinctive tattoo on his upper back, just below his right shoulder blade, as water ripples around him. His wet hair and focused expression suggest he's fully immersed in the refreshing experience.

photos.caption: Last wet adventure on the East Coast.

The river flows calmly behind him, with lush green trees and rocky formations lining the distant banks under a partly cloudy sky, perfectly capturing a moment of transition from water to land.

She's wearing a dark brown bikini and has a small blue towel beneath her, with another pink one nearby. She's looking right at me with a soft smile, enjoying the peaceful atmosphere by the water, which is visible in the background. It was a perfect moment to capture her unwinding amidst the natural beauty of the river.

The river stretches out behind her, calm but wide, with scattered rocks and lush green trees lining the distant bank, and I can clearly see a bridge in the background connecting the two sides. The partly cloudy sky adds to the serene atmosphere of our day out.

Her white top is slightly lifted, revealing a distinct tattoo on her lower back. The river is wide and filled with numerous scattered rocks, creating a sense of movement and natural beauty. In the distance, a long bridge spans across the water, framed by lush green trees lining both banks under a bright, partly cloudy sky. It was a perfect day for exploring the waterside.

photos.captionKii: On May 19, 2008, the dress-up fun with my friends was still going strong, and I caught this funny moment of one of my friends fully embracing the silliness. She's wearing a straw boater hat with a green and gold band, and she's playfully holding a fake mustache up to her lip with her eyes closed, completely in character. Her blue top and the dark, cozy background with what looks like an old wooden doorframe add to the casual, relaxed vibe of our hilarious night in.

photos.caption: Spicy-a meat-a-ball-a
photos.captionKii: On May 19, 2008, the playful spirit of our fun night in continued, and I managed to capture this great shot of my friend fully embracing his character. He's got on a classic straw hat, a fantastic fake mustache, and he's holding a cigarette playfully in his mouth, giving a bit of a serious, yet humorous look straight at the camera. He's wearing a red and white plaid shirt, and the dark background and hint of plants really add to the casual, cozy vibe of our evening.

photos.caption: She's miming a gyro, I think?
photos.captionKii: On May 19, 2008, the evening of pure silliness continued as I caught my friend mid-pose, really embracing her comedic character. She's still rocking that fantastic straw boater hat and the fake mustache, eyes closed in a dramatic or playful expression, with her hand casually up to her face. The dim lighting, softened by the bokeh of distant string lights, adds to the cozy, relaxed, and utterly fun atmosphere we were all enjoying together.

On May 19, 2008, the silly dress-up fun continued, and I captured this humorous shot of my friend fully in character. She's sporting a fantastic straw hat, her glasses, and that hilarious fake mustache, with her eyes closed in a playful, dramatic pose. She's delicately holding a cigarette between her fingers, and her white collared shirt adds to the quirky ensemble. The faint string lights in the background confirm we were still enjoying our cozy, fun night in, full of laughter and memorable moments.

On May 19, 2008, I captured this absolutely hilarious moment of two friends having a blast. The friend on the left is practically doubled over in laughter, looking at the other friend who is just perfectly deadpan in her comical disguise. She's sporting a classic straw boater hat with a green band, oversized aviator sunglasses, and a fantastic fake mustache, all while wearing a green t-shirt. The friend on the left has her arm around her, clearly enjoying the silliness. It was definitely a night filled with laughter and good times.

On May 19, 2008, the dress-up fun continued, and I captured this awesome shot of my friend fully rocking her hilarious costume. She's got that straw boater hat tilted perfectly, those oversized aviator sunglasses on, and a fantastic fake mustache, all while giving a radiant smile. She's wearing a green t-shirt with 'the wrens' printed on it, and her whole demeanor just screams pure joy and silliness from our amazing night in.

On May 19, 2008, the silly antics continued, and I managed to snap this hilarious photo of my friend. She's sporting a fantastic fake mustache, looking right at the camera with a wide, playful grin and her mouth open, clearly mid-laugh or making a funny face. She's wearing a green t-shirt with a graphic print and some patterned shorts, and her pose just radiates fun and humor. The dim lighting really adds to the relaxed, cozy atmosphere of our evening.

photos.caption: Patio weather
photos.captionKii: On May 19, 2008, I captured this calm moment of my friend outdoors, bathed in natural light. He's looking off to the side with a gentle smile, wearing a casual red and white plaid shirt. Behind him, there's a lush backdrop of vibrant green leaves, possibly from a tree or dense bushes, creating a very serene and natural setting. I love how the abundant foliage and the soft lighting give a relaxed vibe to this portrait.

photos.caption: Dual — It always happens that, when someone gets too drunk to bike back, I get to take care of the bike.  And it's usually raining.
photos.captionKii: On May 15, 2008, I captured this late-night moment of a friend posing with his bicycle. He's standing on what looks like steps or a porch, holding his bike and looking directly at me with a friendly smile. The scene is lit by ambient streetlights and the faint glow from houses in the background, creating a cozy urban night atmosphere. Parked cars are visible behind him on the street, suggesting we were in a residential area, just enjoying the quiet of the evening.

On May 2, 2008, I captured a candid moment of a friend during our evening out. She's sitting outdoors, her blonde hair and a distinctive red beaded necklace visible in the soft, dim light, with her sunglasses perched casually on her head. In the background, the glow of streetlights, parked bicycles, and a metal fence suggest we were enjoying the ambiance of a cafe or restaurant patio, just soaking in the night and good company.

On May 1, 2008, I captured this atmospheric, somewhat blurry shot of a friend enjoying our backyard gathering in the dim evening light. He's looking off to the side, wearing glasses, with festive string lights providing a soft glow in the background. The low light and the gentle blur give the photo a candid, relaxed feel, perfectly capturing the cozy and laid-back vibe of our outdoor session.

On May 1, 2008, I captured this quiet moment of a woman enjoying the evening during our backyard gathering. She's sitting comfortably outdoors, lit softly, with a gentle smile on her face, seemingly relaxed. In the foreground, several bottles and glasses are visible, along with a plate that might hold some of the snacks we were preparing, set against the backdrop of the house's wooden siding. The dim lighting and casual setup really convey the cozy atmosphere of our outdoor session, likely a continuation of the fire and roasting we were doing.

photos.caption: GRILL, BITCHES! — First of the season.
photos.captionKii: On May 1, 2008, I captured this striking image of a charcoal grill engulfed in tall, bright orange flames. It looks like I was attempting to roast something, possibly chestnuts or similar nuts, which are visible amidst the fire in the bowl of the grill. The grill stands on a rustic wooden deck, with some outdoor clutter and potted plants in the background, suggesting a casual backyard setting. The intensity of the fire makes for a dramatic photo, probably taken during a fun outdoor cooking or bonfire session.

photos.caption:
Grilled artichokes, mesquite smoked — Had a version of these, encrusted with salt and pepper and spice, at the Hitching Post recently.  They recreate well.  

This is the "before," obviously.
photos.captionKii: On May 1, 2008, I captured the delicious preparations for our meal, with several halved artichokes seasoned and neatly arranged on a baking tray, ready for cooking. Beside them, I had a bottle of olive oil, a small container of what appears to be dried ingredients, and a few spice shakers with red lids, all set on a lovely floral tablecloth. It clearly shows the organized chaos of getting everything ready for a fun outdoor cooking session, likely part of the same backyard fire we were enjoying.

photos.caption: Suit up — I love watching him get dressed for business.  It's even better in hotels.
photos.captionKii: On April 21, 2008, I captured this moment in what looks like a hotel room, where a man in a sharp suit is facing away from me, checking his appearance in a round, gold-framed mirror. He seems to be meticulously adjusting his outfit, perhaps getting ready for an important meeting or event. In the foreground, an ironing board with a silver iron rests, suggesting he might have just finished preparing his clothes. The warm lighting and typical hotel room decor add to the sense of a professional on a trip, making sure everything is just right.

On April 20, 2008, I captured this sign prominently displaying the name 'Chuck Davis' in blue lettering, along with the number '1' in a small blue square. The sign, framed in brown, is set against a light yellow wall, likely inside an office building or a hotel. It caught my eye, perhaps indicating a person's office or a room I was about to enter, marking a specific location or an upcoming encounter.

photos.caption: Tower 10, Santa Monica
photos.captionKii: On April 20, 2008, I captured this classic scene of a lifeguard tower on a sunny beach. The light blue tower, prominently marked with the number 10, stands tall on the golden sand, with a long ramp leading up to its lookout. I noticed some casual graffiti on its sides, adding a bit of character. In the background, the vast sandy beach stretches out, dotted with a few distant beachgoers, and further back, I could see buildings on a gentle slope under a perfectly clear blue sky. It was a beautiful day for a walk by the ocean.

photos.caption: Prodigal son — Dasa, our old housemate's cat, totally defected and came to us!  We miss Dasa!
photos.captionKii: On April 14, 2008, I captured this lovely shot of a friend holding her beautiful, fluffy tabby cat. The cat has strikingly bright yellow-green eyes and a dense, striped coat, looking calmly towards the camera. My friend is smiling softly, her reddish-brown hair gently falling across her face, as she cradles her pet. She's wearing a casual blue top with red sleeves, and we appear to be in a comfortable indoor setting. It was a sweet moment with her and her charming feline companion.

photos.caption: Flooded quai
photos.captionKii: On April 1, 2008, my walk took an interesting turn as I encountered this flooded pathway right next to the water's edge. The paved path was partially submerged, creating shimmering reflections, and the metal railing along the water was also half in the water. To my left, the grassy bank and a large weeping willow tree added to the serene, albeit watery, scene. In the distance, I could see a bridge stretching across the water and what looks like the Washington Monument standing tall, all under a sky dotted with clouds. It was quite a sight to see the path overtaken by water like this during my

On April 1, 2008, I looked up to capture this beautiful shot of a weeping cherry tree, its delicate, light-colored blossoms and slender branches gracefully hanging down. The tree's silhouette stands out against the clear, pale blue sky, with the sun backlighting the tiny flowers, making them glow with a subtle, ethereal light. It was a perfect moment during my walk to appreciate the intricate beauty of these spring blooms from a different perspective.

photos.caption: Dad on the island
photos.captionKii: On April 1, 2008, while enjoying a beautiful spring day, I captured this scene of an older gentleman walking along a concrete promenade. He's dressed in a plaid shirt, light-colored pants, and a baseball cap, carrying a white plastic bag. A white metal railing runs alongside the path, separating it from the slightly choppy, dark water. In the background, across the water, I could clearly see various buildings and a long stretch of cherry blossom trees in full bloom, adding to the picturesque view I was experiencing.

On April 1, 2008, during my cherry blossom walk, I looked up to capture this beautiful sight. The delicate, light-colored blossoms of a tree are silhouetted against a dynamic sky, where fluffy white clouds are scattered across a vibrant blue background. The sun is peeking through the clouds on the left, casting a bright lens flare and backlighting the intricate network of branches and flowers, giving them an ethereal glow. It was a perfect moment to appreciate the beauty overhead.

photos.caption: Sun-dappled
photos.captionKii: On April 1, 2008, continuing my cherry blossom walk, I captured this wider shot across the water. The choppy, dark water fills the foreground, leading up to a beautiful line of cherry trees in full bloom, their light pink and white blossoms forming a delicate band along the shore. Behind them stands a grand, ornate brick building with a distinctive architectural style, possibly a museum or public institution, visible under an overcast sky. It was a lovely perspective to take in the expansive views of the blossoming landscape.

On April 1, 2008, I captured this beautiful scene of cherry blossom trees in full bloom, their delicate white and pale pink flowers creating a canopy of light against a soft, overcast sky. The trees line the edge of a tranquil body of water, possibly a river or lake, with a narrow strip of green grass visible along the bank. The branches, heavy with blossoms, extend gracefully, making for a picturesque spring landscape. It felt like a perfect day to document the fleeting beauty of the season.

photos.caption: Creek before river — What's it called again, Meg?
photos.captionKii: On March 25, 2008, I captured a serene moment overlooking a river. From a concrete structure, perhaps a bridge or observation deck, I framed a person from behind, wearing a light blue hoodie and jeans, standing contemplatively at the edge. They're looking down into the slow-moving, dark water below, surrounded by the stark beauty of bare trees and scattered rocks. The sunlight casts long shadows, highlighting the rugged terrain and the quiet atmosphere of this outdoor scene.

photos.caption: Stairwell
photos.captionKii: On March 25, 2008, I captured this abstract view looking down onto an outdoor structure, perhaps a series of balconies or a multi-level platform, set against a backdrop of bare trees and dry ground. The strong sunlight creates dramatic, geometric shadows across the light-colored surfaces, emphasizing the lines and angles of the architecture. It's a quiet moment of observation, made personal by the distinct shadow of my head and shoulders visible on one of the lower levels, marking my presence within this scene.

On March 25, 2008, I captured this close-up, abstract shot of a heavily rusted metal surface. The rich, earthy tones of brown and orange dominate the frame, highlighting the rough, pitted texture created by years of exposure and decay. The light catches the surface at an angle, emphasizing its unevenness and the subtle variations in color. The composition, with its shallow depth of field, draws the eye to the intricate details of the rust, making an everyday object look like a piece of abstract art. A dark, curved shadow in the lower right corner hints at the object's form, adding a touch of m
